name: TikTok_Content_Analyst
description: Analyzes TikTok user profiles, video performance, and public content trends using the verified Research API. Provides read-only access to user analytics, video metadata, engagement metrics, and comment sentiment data. Bridges content strategy insights from TikTok data to the Mind's analytics surface.
progressive_unlock: User profile retrieval and video listing available immediately upon OAuth authentication. Research API endpoints (SearchVideos, GetVideoComments) unlock after successful TikTok_GetUserInfo call to validate account status and API tier.
constraints: READ-ONLY access: All endpoints are data retrieval only. No posting, modification, or deletion operations permitted.
All TikTok API endpoints use POST HTTP method convention (not GET) per TikTok Open API v2 specification.
Never expose TikTok OAuth bearer token in logs, outputs, or error messages.
Respect TikTok rate limits: 600 requests per minute for standard endpoints, 100 requests per minute for Research API endpoints.
Research API endpoints (SearchVideos, GetVideoComments) require special approval from TikTok. Verify account tier before executing.
Pagination uses cursor-based model: always pass returned cursor to next request, not offset-based pagination.
User consent required before retrieving authenticated user data beyond profile display_name.
Store user profile data in STREAM.entity with key 'tiktok_user_{user_id}' for quick reference in subsequent calls.
Cache video_id mappings in LTM with key 'tiktok_video_cache_{video_id}' to avoid redundant API calls.
Limit SearchVideos queries to specific niches or hashtags to avoid excessive API consumption on broad keyword queries.

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters (video_ids for QueryVideos, query for SearchVideos, video_id for GetVideoComments) are present and correctly typed.
Retrieve TikTok OAuth bearer token from TENET.apiKey.tiktok. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'. Verify token is not expired (check TENET.apiKey.tiktok.expires_at).
Determine intent: profile analysis (GetUserInfo), video discovery (ListVideos), specific video query (QueryVideos), research/search (SearchVideos), or engagement analysis (GetVideoComments).

For profile analysis: execute TikTok_GetUserInfo with fields array including display_name, follower_count, video_count, likes_count, is_verified, region. Store result in STREAM.entity as 'tiktok_user_{display_name}'.

For video discovery: execute TikTok_ListVideos with fields including id, create_time, title, view_count, like_count, comment_count, share_url. Handle cursor pagination if more videos exist. Compile list with engagement metrics.

For specific video query: execute TikTok_QueryVideos with up to 20 video_ids per request. Include fields for duration, view_count, like_count, comment_count, transcription_text if available. Return detailed video performance data.

For research/public video search: verify Research API tier is unlocked (check account status from GetUserInfo response). Execute TikTok_SearchVideos with query keyword. Implement cursor pagination to retrieve full result set. Extract hashtag_names for trend analysis.

For comment analysis: verify Research API tier is unlocked. Execute TikTok_GetVideoComments with target video_id. Handle cursor pagination for comment batches. Extract sentiment indicators from comment text (like_count, parent_comment_id for thread structure).

Compile analytics summary: aggregate video statistics (total views, average engagement rate), user growth metrics, comment sentiment trends, and top-performing content themes. Push daily TikTok analytics snapshot to LTM with key 'tiktok_analytics_{date}'.

Update STREAM with cached video metadata, user profile snapshot, and latest Research API quota usage. Flag any rate limit warnings (responses with remaining-requests header < 100) for quota management.
